title: Gemma Playground: Robot Duck
summary: Google's Gemma Playground showcases Gemma 4 E2B running on-device on Raspberry Pi 5 and Jetson Orin Nano to power two Open Duck Mini v2 robots with real-time multimodal interaction. The system integrates Parakeet for speech-to-text, Gemma 4 for inference, and Kokoro for text-to-speech, enabling the robots to listen, process, and respond in real time.
writeup: Xavier Plantaz demonstrates running Gemma 4 E2B on Open Duck Mini v2 robots, using a Raspberry Pi 5 and a Jetson Orin Nano as the compute. The on-device stack pairs Parakeet for speech-to-text, Gemma 4 for inference, and Kokoro for text-to-speech, with cameras, microphones, and speakers feeding real-time multimodal interaction. The build shows a full edge deployment where speech recognition, model inference, and audio generation run locally rather than in the cloud.
